title: Modern Beta Forge Rivers
description: Adds river generation for Modern Beta Forge 1.12.2
body: ## River Generation for Modern Beta Forge 1.12.2! An add-on for [Modern Beta Forge for 1.12.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-beta-forge) (versions 1.8.0.0 or later) which adds river generation for Beta, Alpha, Infdev 20100611, and Pocket Edition terrain generators. ### Usage Navigate to the _Add-on_ tab in the world customization GUI, enable river generation, and then tweak several settings to control river generation, including river rarity, depth, depth variation, and width/weight. ### Server Usage The following should be done in the server.properties file: * Set the 'levelType' field to 'modernbeta', without the quotes. * Set generation options in the 'generator-settings' field. You can create the generator options string using the in-game GUI.
